patch.value: pm close <id> -m 'text' still hard-blocks with close_reason_required: accept --message text as close-reason fallback (like closed pm-7x8d did for --resolution)

2026-07-04 sandbox audit #3 (fresh npm-pack CJS project): 'pm close <id> -m done' fails with close_reason_required even though the agent supplied a summary via -m. Agents coming from git idiom use -m for the closing message. pm-7x8d already established the never-block precedent by accepting --resolution as the reason. Fix: when require_close_reason is on and no positional/--reason given, fall back to --message text as the close reason (still recorded as history message too); at minimum the error must acknowledge that -m/--message was provided and point to --reason.
